sources.excerpt: Official location page enumerates the current exact-location food and nonalcoholic catalog.
2026-06-17 menu PDF lists the current catalog, explicit pistachio wording, and asks guests to ask staff about potential cross-contamination.
The Wharf; Washington DC; 645 Wharf Street SW; pick-up, delivery + dine-in.

restaurantWideCautions.statement: Ask bartaco staff about potential cross-contamination.
